title: ANSIO Dehumidifier Disposable Pack of 10 Room Moisture Absorber Condensation Remover De Humidifiers for Damp, Mould in Home, Bathroom, Window, House, Kitchen, Wardrobe, Bedroom Interior Moisture Traps
features: DAMPNESS / HUMIDITY REMOVER: Ansio Interior Dehumidifiers are designed to remove dampness & humidity from the air. For domestic purposes only.

EFFECTIVE IN REMOVING DAMPNESS: These disposable Dehumidifier tubs contain unique hydrophilic crystals that are specifically formulated to draw and retain moisture from the air. This helps combat condensation, damp rooms, allergens in the air, mould, mildew and neutralises odours. The dehumidifier tubs act as good condensation absorbers for windows.

MOISTURE ABSORBERS: Designed to reduce mould, these dehumidifier tubs are ideal for rooms including kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms, bedrooms, basements, caravans, boats, garages or in any place where excess moisture is causing a problem.

EASY TO USE: Remove the plastic lid and peel back foil wrapper. Put the lid back on and place the tub where needed. DO NOT remove the white safety sheet. The first drop appears within 1 - 3 weeks depending on the humidity level. Absorbs up to 3 times its own weight in water. The tubs are portable and easy to move around according to your needs.
SAFETY CAUTION: Place the tub on a flat surface and keep it upright all times to avoid leakage of the condensed water. Keep this product away from children’s reach.
description: Product Description Ansio's interior dehumidifier is compact and designed to remove moisture from wardrobes and other small areas. The dehumidifier prevents damp, mould, mildew & condensation by absorbing moisture from the air. T he hydrophilic crystals inside the dehumidifiers draw damp and retain moisture. Quick and easy way to reduce dampness and remove excess moisture from air. The dehumidifier can trap moisture up-to three times its own weight. A n efficient way to eradicate dampness and to improve the quality of air in small areas. The dehumidifiers take up little space and are great for keeping the clothes in your wardrobe fresh and dry, while combating mould and mildew. Keeps small areas in your home, office, car or caravan damp free by removing excess moisture from the air.
